### 📝 Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

### 👣 Reproduction Steps
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

### 🤔 Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen vs. what actually happened.

### 💻 Environment
 - **OS:** [e.g. macOS 14]
 - **Browser/Version:** [e.g. Chrome 120]
